description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with a predominantly flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is finished in a light gray material, likely concrete or stucco, with subtle horizontal and vertical paneling details. One side of the house includes a stepped section, possibly indicating a garage or utility area, while the opposite end reveals a partially open section with visible interior elements such as partition walls and what appears to be a staircase or shelving. The windows are arranged in narrow, vertical strips, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is recessed and features a dark accent, possibly a door or overhang, providing a visual focal point. Overall, the structure exudes a sleek, urban feel suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with clean lines, light gray exterior, and vertical strip windows. Features a recessed entryway and a partially open section revealing interior details.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, showing its elongated shape, stepped section on the right, and a dark accent at the far left, likely the entryway.
description_view_1: Viewed from the narrow end, the stepped section is prominent, and the vertical strip window pattern is visible along the facade.
description_view_2: The opposite side reveals a partially open section with interior partitions and a staircase or shelving, as well as additional vertical window strips.
description_view_3: From this end, the open section is most visible, showing interior details and a dark-framed area that may serve as a secondary entry or patio.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a dark accent, minimal overhang, and no visible porch or steps
